nodes.name: Greek Protein Power Bowl
nodes.description: name: Greek Protein Power Bowl | short_description: A high-protein Greek-style breakfast bowl loaded with thick strained yogurt, hard-boiled eggs, feta, chickpeas, and olive oil — over 40g of protein
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Greek Protein Power Bowl - name: Greek Protein Power Bowl | short_description: A high-protein Greek-style breakfast bowl loaded with thick strained yogurt, hard-boiled eggs, feta, chickpeas, and olive oil — over 40g of protein to fuel the morning. | meal_suggestion: Spoon a generous portion of thick Greek yogurt into a bowl. Halve two hard-boiled eggs and arrange on top with crumbled feta, a handful of roasted chickpeas, sliced cucumber, and cherry tomatoes. Drizzle with extra-virgin olive oil and sprinkle with dried oregano and a pinch of za'atar. Serve with a wedge of whole-wheat pita on the side. | nutrition_note: Exceptionally high in protein: Greek yogurt (~17g per cup), two eggs (~12g), feta (~6g), and chickpeas (~7g) combine for 40g+ protein. Chickpeas add fiber and iron; olive oil provides heart-healthy monounsaturated fats. Cucumber and tomatoes supply hydration and vitamins C and K. A true Greek-inspired powerhouse breakfast for sustained energy and muscle support.

nodes.name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise
nodes.description: name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise | short_description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce with cumin and paprika, served with crusty bread for dipping — a vibrant, savory Mediterranean
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise - name: Shakshuka — Mediterranean Sunrise | short_description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato-pepper sauce with cumin and paprika, served with crusty bread for dipping — a vibrant, savory Mediterranean breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Sauté diced onion, garlic, and bell pepper in olive oil. Add crushed tomatoes, cumin, paprika, and a pinch of chili flakes; simmer 10 minutes. Create wells and crack eggs into the sauce, cover and cook until whites are set. Sprinkle with crumbled feta and fresh parsley. Serve with warm crusty bread or pita for dipping. | nutrition_note: Eggs provide high-quality protein and choline; tomatoes are rich in lycopene and vitamin C; bell peppers add additional vitamin C and antioxidants. Cumin and paprika offer anti-inflammatory compounds. Olive oil supplies healthy fats. A moderate-calorie, nutrient-dense breakfast; control sodium through feta portions.

nodes.name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal
nodes.description: name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal | short_description: Warm oatmeal topped with dried figs, walnuts, honey, and a swirl of tahini — a Mediterranean twist on a classic breakfast with wholesome fl
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal - name: Mediterranean Fig & Honey Oatmeal | short_description: Warm oatmeal topped with dried figs, walnuts, honey, and a swirl of tahini — a Mediterranean twist on a classic breakfast with wholesome flavors. | meal_suggestion: Cook oats in milk or water until creamy. Top with sliced dried figs, crushed walnuts, a drizzle of raw honey, and a spoonful of tahini. Finish with a light sprinkle of cinnamon and a few pomegranate seeds if available. Pair with a small glass of fresh orange juice for a complete Mediterranean morning. | nutrition_note: Oats provide soluble fiber (beta-glucan) for heart health and steady blood sugar; walnuts are rich in omega-3 ALA and vitamin E; figs supply potassium, calcium, and iron; tahini adds healthy fats, protein, and calcium. Honey adds natural sweetness — use sparingly. A well-rounded Mediterranean breakfast with complex carbs, healthy fats, and fiber.

nodes.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate
nodes.description: name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: Creamy, mildly spiced apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats, milk, and apple. | meal_suggestion: Dairy-free option: use fortified
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate - name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: Creamy, mildly spiced apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats, milk, and apple. | meal_suggestion: Dairy-free option: use fortified plant milk. Boost protein by adding a tablespoon of nut butter or a sprinkle of chia/flax seeds. If extra sweetness is desired, drizzle honey or maple syrup. Top with extra sliced apple or a pinch more cinnamon for aroma. | nutrition_note: Oats supply soluble fiber (beta-glucan) for fullness; milk provides protein and calcium; apple adds vitamins and natural sweetness; cinnamon enhances flavor with minimal added sugar. A balanced, warming breakfast; adjust dairy or sweetness as needed.

nodes.name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation
nodes.description: name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Ricotta toast with berries and a light honey drizzle—fiber-rich and protein-boosted for a quick, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Toas
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation - name: Ricotta Toast — Berry Boost Variation | short_description: Ricotta toast with berries and a light honey drizzle—fiber-rich and protein-boosted for a quick, balanced meal. | meal_suggestion: Toast the whole-grain bread, spread ricotta, top with berries, and drizzle honey. Optional: sprinkle a pinch of cinnamon for extra flavor. | nutrition_note: Protein from ricotta; fiber from whole-grain bread and berries; natural sugars from honey and berries. A quick, balanced option—adjust honey to control sugar intake.

nodes.name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set
nodes.description: name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set | short_description: Protein-forward Japanese-inspired breakfast featuring miso, tofu, egg, green onion, and rice. | meal_suggestion: Prepare a warm miso broth a
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set - name: Miso Breakfast Set — Classic Set | short_description: Protein-forward Japanese-inspired breakfast featuring miso, tofu, egg, green onion, and rice. | meal_suggestion: Prepare a warm miso broth and add tofu cubes and green onion; gently add or scramble an egg and cook to preferred doneness, then serve over steamed rice. Garnish with extra green onion for freshness. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast with tofu and egg, balanced by rice; provides energy from carbohydrates and healthy fats. Contains soy and is potentially high in sodium due to miso. For lower sodium, choose low-sodium miso and moderate portions.

nodes.name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Smoky Combo
nodes.description: name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Smoky Combo | short_description: A balanced snack of mixed fruit, yogurt, and nuts delivering fiber, protein, and healthy fats. | meal_suggestion: Assemble a serving with 1 c
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Fruit & Nut Plate — Smoky Combo - name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Smoky Combo | short_description: A balanced snack of mixed fruit, yogurt, and nuts delivering fiber, protein, and healthy fats. | meal_suggestion: Assemble a serving with 1 cup mixed fruit, ¼–½ cup plain Greek yogurt, and a small handful (about ¼ cup) nuts; enjoy as a portable, balanced snack and adjust portions to fit your daily needs. | nutrition_note: Provides fiber and antioxidants from fruit, protein and calcium from yogurt, and healthy fats from nuts. To keep sugar and calories in check, choose plain yogurt and unsalted nuts.

nodes.name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Twist
nodes.description: name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Twist | short_description: Creamy overnight oats with milk, plain yogurt, apple and cinnamon; a protein- and fiber-rich breakfast that can be brightened with a citr
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Twist - name: Overnight Oats — Citrus Fresh Twist | short_description: Creamy overnight oats with milk, plain yogurt, apple and cinnamon; a protein- and fiber-rich breakfast that can be brightened with a citrus note. | meal_suggestion: For a true Citrus Fresh Twist, add citrus zest (orange or lemon) or a small splash of juice to brighten the oats. Top with chopped nuts or seeds for healthy fats and extra crunch. Consider vanilla yogurt or a touch of vanilla extract for depth. | nutrition_note: Balanced breakfast with protein and calcium from yogurt and milk, plus fiber from oats and apple. No added sugar in the base ingredients; cinnamon adds flavor and may support blood sugar regulation. Calories vary with dairy choices but it's a filling, nutrient-dense start to the day.

nodes.name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Citrus Fresh Variation
nodes.description: name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Citrus Fresh Variation | short_description: Whole-grain pancakes with egg, milk, berries, and maple syrup—fiber-rich, protein-containing breakfast with natural sweetness.
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Citrus Fresh Variation - name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Citrus Fresh Variation | short_description: Whole-grain pancakes with egg, milk, berries, and maple syrup—fiber-rich, protein-containing breakfast with natural sweetness. | meal_suggestion: Serve with a small yogurt or extra berries for added protein or fiber. To echo the citrus theme, garnish with orange zest or add a splash of citrus juice to the batter. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich whole-wheat batter with egg and milk provides sustained energy and high-quality protein; berries add vitamins, fiber, and antioxidants; maple syrup adds sweetness with natural sugars. The Citrus Fresh Variation name suggests optional citrus zest or juice for extra vitamin C and bright flavor, not included in the base ingredients.

nodes.name: Miso Breakfast Set — Sesame Variation
nodes.description: name: Miso Breakfast Set — Sesame Variation | short_description: Miso breakfast set with tofu, egg, green onion, rice, and optional sesame variation for a protein-packed savory morning meal. | meal_su
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Miso Breakfast Set — Sesame Variation - name: Miso Breakfast Set — Sesame Variation | short_description: Miso breakfast set with tofu, egg, green onion, rice, and optional sesame variation for a protein-packed savory morning meal. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a balanced bowl: mix in the tofu with a small amount of miso for flavor, top with green onion and a gently cooked egg, and accompany with steamed rice. If sesame variation is used, finish with toasted sesame seeds for extra texture; opt for low-sodium miso to keep sodium in check. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast from tofu and egg supports satiety and muscle maintenance. Includes rice for steady energy; miso provides fermentation-associated flavor and potential gut benefits. Sodium intake can be high from miso paste—consider low-sodium miso if needed. Sesame variation may add healthy fats and a nutty flavor if sesame is used.

nodes.name: Breakfast Sandwich — Sesame Bowl
nodes.description: name: Breakfast Sandwich — Sesame Bowl | short_description: A savory breakfast sandwich on a whole-wheat English muffin with egg, cheddar, and tomato. | meal_suggestion: Quick, balanced breakfast. To
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Breakfast Sandwich — Sesame Bowl - name: Breakfast Sandwich — Sesame Bowl | short_description: A savory breakfast sandwich on a whole-wheat English muffin with egg, cheddar, and tomato. | meal_suggestion: Quick, balanced breakfast. To adjust: add another egg or more cheese for extra protein; use egg whites and light cheese to lower calories; choose a higher-fiber muffin to boost fiber. | nutrition_note: Approx 320–420 kcal; protein 15–20 g; carbs 30–40 g; fat 9–12 g. Fiber from the whole-wheat muffin; tomato adds micronutrients. Sodium varies with cheese; consider lower-sodium cheddar to reduce salt.

nodes.name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Variation
nodes.description: name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Variation | short_description: Smoky breakfast wrap with egg, turkey, spinach in a whole-wheat tortilla and salsa. | meal_suggestion: For lower sodium, use low-sodium turk
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Variation - name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Variation | short_description: Smoky breakfast wrap with egg, turkey, spinach in a whole-wheat tortilla and salsa. | meal_suggestion: For lower sodium, use low-sodium turkey and salsa; add avocado for healthy fats to enhance fullness and flavor. | nutrition_note: Balanced breakfast wrap with lean protein (turkey and egg) and fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach. Monitor sodium from turkey and salsa; consider low-sodium options if needed.

nodes.name: Banana Bread Toast — Sesame Combo
nodes.description: name: Banana Bread Toast — Sesame Combo | short_description: Banana bread toast topped with yogurt and berries for a protein-fiber balanced snack. | meal_suggestion: Toast a slice of banana bread; spr
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Banana Bread Toast — Sesame Combo - name: Banana Bread Toast — Sesame Combo | short_description: Banana bread toast topped with yogurt and berries for a protein-fiber balanced snack. | meal_suggestion: Toast a slice of banana bread; spread with Greek yogurt; top with fresh berries. If desired, sprinkle a small amount of sesame seeds for crunch and extra minerals. | nutrition_note: Protein: moderate from Greek yogurt; carbs from banana bread and berries; fiber from berries (and banana bread depending on recipe). Fat varies with yogurt type; watch added sugars in banana bread. This combo provides calcium and vitamins from dairy and fruit; suitable as a quick breakfast or snack.

nodes.name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Variation
nodes.description: name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Variation | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk, with an optional maple-sweetened variation. | meal_suggestion: Serve
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Variation - name: Apple-Cinnamon Porridge — Maple-Kissed Variation | short_description: Creamy apple-cinnamon porridge made with oats and milk, with an optional maple-sweetened variation. | meal_suggestion: Serve warm as a comforting breakfast. For extra protein, top with yogurt or nuts; if you want the maple-kissed variation, swirl in a small amount of maple syrup. | nutrition_note: Fiber-rich oats and apple support fullness; milk adds protein and calcium; cinnamon adds flavor with minimal added sugar. Maple-kissed variation suggests a light maple sweetness—add maple syrup sparingly if desired.

nodes.name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Mild-Spice Plate
nodes.description: name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: Whole-grain pancakes with berries and maple syrup—fiber-rich, protein-present, and naturally sweet with a touch of mild spice. | meal
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Mild-Spice Plate - name: Whole-Grain Pancakes — Mild-Spice Plate | short_description: Whole-grain pancakes with berries and maple syrup—fiber-rich, protein-present, and naturally sweet with a touch of mild spice. | meal_suggestion: Pair with Greek yogurt or additional berries for extra protein and fiber. Serve warm with a light drizzle of maple syrup; optionally add a pinch of cinnamon for a mild spice note. | nutrition_note: High-fiber, protein-containing plate from whole-wheat flour, egg, and milk; antioxidants from berries; natural sugars from maple syrup. To limit added sugars, drizzle sparingly and consider lighter syrup or fruit topping.

nodes.name: Breakfast Wrap — Citrus Fresh Bake
nodes.description: name: Breakfast Wrap — Citrus Fresh Bake | short_description: A quick, balanced breakfast wrap with a whole-wheat tortilla, egg, turkey, spinach, and salsa. | meal_suggestion: Pair with a piece of fru
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Breakfast Wrap — Citrus Fresh Bake - name: Breakfast Wrap — Citrus Fresh Bake | short_description: A quick, balanced breakfast wrap with a whole-wheat tortilla, egg, turkey, spinach, and salsa. | meal_suggestion: Pair with a piece of fruit (e.g., orange) for extra vitamin C, and consider a squeeze of lime or a bit of avocado for freshness. To reduce sodium, use low-sodium turkey and homemade salsa. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich from egg and turkey; fiber and micronutrients from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach; salsa adds flavor and vitamin C. Mind sodium: turkey and salsa can be high-sodium—choose low-sodium turkey or add extra veggies to boost volume.

nodes.name: Breakfast Wrap — Lemon-Herb Skillet
nodes.description: name: Breakfast Wrap — Lemon-Herb Skillet | short_description: A warm breakfast wrap featuring a whole-wheat tortilla, scrambled egg, turkey slices, spinach, and salsa, cooked in a lemon-herb skillet.
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Breakfast Wrap — Lemon-Herb Skillet - name: Breakfast Wrap — Lemon-Herb Skillet | short_description: A warm breakfast wrap featuring a whole-wheat tortilla, scrambled egg, turkey slices, spinach, and salsa, cooked in a lemon-herb skillet. | meal_suggestion: A quick, balanced breakfast wrap with protein, fiber, and vegetables; pair with fruit or yogurt for a fuller morning meal. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich meal thanks to egg and turkey; fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach; salsa adds flavor with minimal added sugar. Sodium can be modest-to-high depending on turkey and salsa—opt for low-sodium versions if needed. For more fiber, add extra greens or use a higher-fiber tortilla; for lower fat, use egg whites and a smaller tortilla.

nodes.name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Combo
nodes.description: name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Combo | short_description: Protein-packed breakfast wrap with egg, turkey, spinach, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Suggestions: swap turkey for ch
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Combo - name: Breakfast Wrap — Smoky Combo | short_description: Protein-packed breakfast wrap with egg, turkey, spinach, and salsa in a whole-wheat tortilla. | meal_suggestion: Suggestions: swap turkey for chicken or plant-based protein; add avocado for healthy fats; include additional colorful veggies (bell peppers, onions); use low-sodium salsa or serve as a bowl to vary texture. | nutrition_note: Protein-rich breakfast with egg and turkey, plus fiber from whole-wheat tortilla and spinach. Includes vegetables and salsa; watch sodium levels from turkey and salsa—choose low-sodium options or reduce added salt. Optional avocado adds healthy fats.

nodes.name: Oatmeal — Lemon-Herb Set
nodes.description: name: Oatmeal — Lemon-Herb Set | short_description: Creamy oatmeal with banana and almonds for a satisfying, wholesome breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Enjoy warm as a filling breakfast bowl. To echo the
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Oatmeal — Lemon-Herb Set - name: Oatmeal — Lemon-Herb Set | short_description: Creamy oatmeal with banana and almonds for a satisfying, wholesome breakfast. | meal_suggestion: Enjoy warm as a filling breakfast bowl. To echo the Lemon-Herb theme, add a splash of lemon zest and herbs, or top with fresh berries for extra flavor and antioxidants. | nutrition_note: High in fiber from oats, protein from milk and almonds, and natural sugars from banana. Provides calcium and potassium with healthy fats; a balanced, satiating breakfast.

nodes.name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake
nodes.description: name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick, balanced plate of mixed fruit, nuts, and yogurt with a berry-boosted flavor profile. | meal_suggestion: Portion idea: 1 cup mix
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake - name: Fruit & Nut Plate — Berry Boost Bake | short_description: A quick, balanced plate of mixed fruit, nuts, and yogurt with a berry-boosted flavor profile. | meal_suggestion: Portion idea: 1 cup mixed fruit, 1/2 cup yogurt, and a small handful (about 1 oz / 28 g) of nuts. Add cinnamon or a light drizzle of honey if desired. For higher protein, use Greek yogurt. | nutrition_note: Fiber- and vitamin-rich fruit paired with yogurt provides protein and calcium; nuts add healthy fats and satiety. Natural sugars come from the fruit, so watch portions if you're monitoring calories.

nodes.name: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl
nodes.description: name: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl | short_description: Banana bread toast topped with Greek yogurt and berries—a quick, balanced breakfast with protein, carbs, and fiber. | meal_suggestion: Toas
nodes.text_for_embedding: Meal: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl - name: Banana Bread Toast — Classic Bowl | short_description: Banana bread toast topped with Greek yogurt and berries—a quick, balanced breakfast with protein, carbs, and fiber. | meal_suggestion: Toast a slice of banana bread, spread with Greek yogurt, and top with a handful of fresh berries. | nutrition_note: Balanced mix of carbs, protein, and micronutrients: banana bread provides energy; Greek yogurt supplies protein and calcium; berries deliver fiber and antioxidants. For a lighter option, use whole-grain banana bread and low-fat yogurt.
